title: ELE GOSTA DE VEGETAIS, MAS NÃO GOSTA DE SALADA
subtitle: HE LIKES VEGETABLES, _____ HE DOESN’T LIKE SALAD

title: Repita a frase
answer: HE LIKES VEGETABLES, BUT HE DOESN’T LIKE SALAD
a: HE LIKES VEGETABLES BUT HE DOESN’T LIKE SALAD
translate: ELE GOSTA DE VEGETAIS, MAS NÃO GOSTA DE SALADA

title: ELA ESTÁ COM DOR DE CABEÇA, ENTÃO PRECISA IR NO MÉDICO
subtitle: SHE HAS A HEADACHE, ____ SHE NEEDS TO SEE A DOCTOR

title: Repita a frase
answer: SHE HAS A HEADACHE, SO SHE NEEDS TO SEE A DOCTOR
a: SHE HAS A HEADACHE SO SHE NEEDS TO SEE A DOCTOR
translate: ELA ESTÁ COM DOR DE CABEÇA, ENTÃO PRECISA IR NO MÉDICO

title: ESSE SOFÁ É MAIOR E PORTANTO, MAIS CONFORTÁVEL
subtitle: THIS SOFA IS BIGGER AND _______ MORE COMFORTABLE

title: Repita a frase
answer: THIS SOFA IS BIGGER AND THEREFORE MORE COMFORTABLE
translate: ESSE SOFÁ É MAIOR E PORTANTO, MAIS CONFORTÁVEL

title: O HOTEL É BARATO, ALÉM DISSO, TEM UMA PISCINA
subtitle: THE HOTEL IS CHEAP, ________, THERE IS A SWIMMING POOL

title: Repita a frase
answer: THE HOTEL IS CHEAP, MOREOVER, THERE IS A SWIMMING POOL
a: THE HOTEL IS CHEAP MOREOVER THERE IS A SWIMMING POOL
translate: O HOTEL É BARATO, ALÉM DISSO, TEM UMA PISCINA

title: É, NO ENTANTO, UMA DECISÃO QUE ELES TÊM QUE TOMAR
subtitle: IT IS, ________, A DECISION THEY HAVE TO MAKE

title: Repita a frase
answer: IT IS, HOWEVER, A DECISION THEY HAVE TO MAKE
a: IT IS HOWEVER A DECISION THEY HAVE TO MAKE
translate: É, NO ENTANTO, UMA DECISÃO QUE ELES TÊM QUE TOMAR

answer: SHE DOESN’T EAT MEAT FOR MANY REASONS

title: ELE GOSTA DE ALGUM OUTRO JOGO ALÉM DE XADREZ?
subtitle: DOES HE LIKE ANY OTHER GAMES _______ CHESS?

answer: DOES HE LIKE ANY OTHER GAMES BESIDES CHESS?
a: DOES HE LIKE ANY OTHER GAMES BESIDES CHESS
translate: ELE GOSTA DE ALGUM OUTRO JOGO ALÉM DE XADREZ?

title: ELA PRATICA VÁRIOS TIPOS DE ESPORTES, POR EXEMPLO, TÊNIS

answer: SHE PLAYS A LOT OF KINDS OF SPORTS, FOR INSTANCE, TENNIS
a: SHE PLAYS A LOT OF KINDS OF SPORTS FOR INSTANCE TENNIS
translate: ELA PRATICA VÁRIOS TIPOS DE ESPORTES, POR EXEMPLO, TÊNIS

title: ELES DECIDIRAM IR, EMBORA ESTIVESSE CHOVENDO
subtitle: THEY DECIDED TO GO, ___________ IT WAS RAINING

title: Repita a frase
answer: THEY DECIDED TO GO, ALTHOUGH IT WAS RAINING
a: THEY DECIDED TO GO ALTHOUGH IT WAS RAINING
translate: ELES DECIDIRAM IR, EMBORA ESTIVESSE CHOVENDO

title: ELA FEZ ISSO PORQUE ERA A COISA CERTA A FAZER

answer: SHE DID IT BECAUSE IT WAS THE RIGHT THING TO DO

answer: AS IT WAS GETTING DARK, I WENT HOME
a: AS IT WAS GETTING DARK I WENT HOME
translate: COMO ESTAVA ESCURECENDO, EU FUI PARA CASA

translate: É BOM FAZER EXERCÍCIOS, POR EXEMPLO, PARA A SUA SAÚDE

title: JÁ QUE TEMOS TEMPO, VAMOS COMER ALGUMA COISA

answer: SINCE WE HAVE TIME, LET’S EAT SOMETHING
a: SINCE WE HAVE TIME LET’S EAT SOMETHING
